summary: Per-drive Keep Awake, balanced Results pie chart, and a wider System Status menu bar panel.
introduced: Keep Awake shows a drive list — Macintosh HD is always included; external drives can be toggled individually
changed: Results pie chart and category details use a 50/50 side-by-side layout
System Status menu bar popover matches disk space size (520px) with Top CPU and Top Memory columns side by side
